style_authority.note: Separates adaptive product intent and shared semantics from platform-native navigation, controls, typography, materials, and motion.

reference_selection.note: Selects product context, iOS, Android, adaptive layout, accessibility, interaction, motion, and runtime validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Repairs platform trust, task flow, and adaptive structure without proposing identical visual skins or generic decoration.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review L0 static/prose only and explicitly denies source, build, simulator, emulator, hardware, and accessibility-tree proof.

verified_boundary.note: Separates supplied implementation facts from unverified targets, gestures, persistence, runtime behavior, haptics, performance, and device outcomes.

design_moves.note: Covers native navigation, adaptive structures, target sizes, scalable type, native controls, semantic themes, accessible motion, recovery, and a parity matrix.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, prioritized, native-conformance focused, and within the 150-line budget at 135 lines.
